authors.author: Robert Lowry
Robert Lowry
Nur das Blut des Lammes Jesu (Was macht mich von Sünden rein)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2 v7 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What can wash away my sin? Nothing but the blood of Jesus; What can make me whole again? Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, precious is the flow That makes me white as snow; No other fount I know, Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For my cleansing this I see, Nothing but the blood of Jesus; For my pardon this my plea, Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Nothing can for sin atone, Nothing but the blood of Jesus; Naught of good that I have done, Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is all my hope and peace, Nothing but the blood of Jesus; This is all my righteousness, Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Now by this I’ll overcome, Nothing but the blood of Jesus; Now by this I’ll reach my home, Nothing but the blood of Jesus.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Glory! glory! thus I sing, Nothing but the blood of Jesus; All my praise for this I bring, Nothing but the blood of Jesus.
